free_text: The Total Neutron Cross Section Of Lithium-7 and Carbon
keV, determined mainly by target thickness.
99.991% 7Li samples encased in stainless steel cans.
Concentric rings of BF3 counters used below
650 keV. Above 650-keV neutron energy, these were
replaced by a 5 x 5-cm diameter liquid scintillator
Corrected for background and for target thickness.
Errors given are statistical errors only.
